## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` when the user flow or UI changed
- [ ] Mobile checked at 320px and 390px when the UI changed

## Product and operations

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` updated if priority or scope changed
- [ ] README/architecture/ADR updated when required
- [ ] No new secret exposure, unbounded API calls, or unsafe migration edits
